mapper.select: SELECT id, doctor_no, name, gender, title, phone, department_id FROM doctor
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO doctor (doctor_no, name, gender, title, phone, department_id) VALUES (#{doctorNo}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{title}, #{phone}, #{departmentId})
mapper.update: UPDATE doctor SET doctor_no = #{doctorNo}, name = #{name}, gender = #{gender}, title = #{title}, phone = #{phone}, department_id = #{departmentId} WHERE id = #{id}
